a.xlink:title: Output filter state to a file for later reading.
Returns the type of object that is located at the specified position in a file.
Set receiver options for a specific receiver using a hierarchy of sources.
Set satellite options for a specific satellite using a hierarchy of sources.
Returns the value and variance of a state within the kalman filter object.
Adds a design matrix entry for this measurement.
Adds the actual measurement value for this measurement.
Add process noise and dynamics to filter object according to time gap.
Combine a list of KFMeasEntrys into a single KFMeas object for used in the filter.
Least squares estimator for new kalman filter states.
Output keys and states in human readable format.
